mapper.insert: MERGE INTO subject_grade_weights (subject_id, attendance_weight, midterm_weight, final_weight, assignment_weight) KEY (subject_id) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{attendanceWeight}, #{midtermWeight}, #{finalWeight}, #{assignmentWeight})
mapper.select: SELECT st.id AS student_id, st.student_number, st.name, st.status, sg.attendance_score, sg.midterm_score, sg.final_score, sg.assignment_score FROM students st INNER JOIN subjects sub ON sub.id = #{subjectId} LEFT JOIN subject_grades sg ON sg.student_id = st.id AND sg.subject_id = #{subjectId} WHERE st.department = sub.department ORDER BY st.student_number
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO subject_grades (subject_id, student_id, attendance_score, midterm_score, final_score, assignment_score) KEY (subject_id, student_id) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{entry.studentId}, #{entry.attendanceScore}, #{entry.midtermScore}, #{entry.finalScore}, #{entry.assignmentScore})
